title: benkara evenosa
intro: Benkara evenosa, also known as Colebrookea evenosa, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Benkara evenosa can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
